---
title: "Accessibility"
---

## Accessibility Statement

ECLIPSE Lab aims to make this website accessible and usable for all visitors.

### Our goals

- Clear page structure and headings
- Readable contrast and typography
- Keyboard-friendly navigation where possible

### Known limitations

Some legacy content and embedded media may not yet fully meet current accessibility best practices.

### Feedback

If you encounter an accessibility barrier, please let us know via the [Contact](contact.qmd) page so we can improve the site.
